name: tribastion

scripts.backend: cd backend && npm install && node src/server.js
scripts.frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm start
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run frontend" "npm run pii"

description: Tribastion is a production-ready, full-stack web platform built for automatic detection, extraction, and sanitization of Personally Identifiable Information (PII) from multiple data formats.
